features.name: zero_width_signed_integer_input
features.description: Code should include a zero-width signed integer (SInt<0>) used as a circuit input
features.snippet: input signed [0:0] inp_bb; // zero-width signed input

features.name: bitwise_or_with_extended_operands
features.description: Code should include a bitwise OR operation where one operand is a sign-extended value and the other is a widened wire

features.name: signed_conversion_of_bitwise_result
features.description: Code should include a signed type conversion ($signed()) applied to the result of a bitwise operation with inferred width
features.snippet:
wire [4:0] tmp49;
wire signed [4:0] converted = $signed(tmp49); // signed conversion of bitwise result

features.name: tail_truncation_followed_by_add
features.description: Code should include a tail/truncation operation followed by an addition with a small unsigned constant, where width inference must reconcile the operands
features.snippet:
wire [15:0] tmp23;
wire [16:0] _tmp31 = tmp23 + 2'b01; // addition with width mismatch during inference
